title: Updated the `isSignatureAuthorAccepted` to use timeout to prevent indefinite hanging
body:
Since the root cause of indefinite hanging during GPG verification operations (https://issues.redhat.com/browse/OCPBUGS-57893) is currently unknown, add a timeout workaround to mitigate the impact. This prevents CRI-O image pulls with signature verification from hanging indefinitely.

<!--- Please read the [contributing guidelines](https://github.com/containers/container-libs/blob/main/CONTRIBUTING.md) before proceeding --->

comments.body: ✅ A new PR has been created in buildah to vendor these changes: **https://github.com/containers/buildah/pull/6456**

There are viable avenues to pursue investigating the root cause (e.g. https://github.com/proglottis/gpgme/pull/48#issuecomment-3499592289 as a minimal public reference), so I don’t think we want to commit to this workaround, at least for now.
